title: Interviews on Peer Support and Experiential Knowledge in Child and Family Services 2019-2020
description: The dataset consists of interviews with 24 directors and managers who work in child and family services. The interviews charted organisational practices related to peer support and experential knowledge in child and family services. The data were collected as part of the VerKo - Service user involvement and peer support in child and family services project.
